document.source_title: ‘If we hold crucial moments, we can win’: Axar Patel on Delhi Capitals’ missed chances

claims.claim_text: Delhi Capitals can still qualify for the playoffs if they win their remaining matches.
claims.evidence_text: if the Axar Patel-led team can win their remaining matches, they can still qualify for the play-offs if other permutations and combinations go their way.

entities.name: Delhi Capitals
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Delhi, India.
entities.evidence_text: Delhi Capitals keep themselves alive in the playoff race of IPL 2026 with a three-wicket win over Punjab Kings.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Mohali, Punjab, India.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings raced to a breezy start as their openers Priyanshu Arya and Prabhsimran Singh amassed 51 runs in the first three overs.

entities.name: Axar Patel
entities.description: Indian cricketer and captain of Delhi Capitals.
entities.evidence_text: Skipper Axar Patel sounded hopeful that the team can do well in the remaining matches.

entities.name: David Miller
entities.description: South African cricketer who played for Delhi Capitals.
entities.evidence_text: a 64-run fifth-wicket partnership between Patel and David Miller.

events.event: Delhi Capitals vs Punjab Kings match
events.evidence_text: Delhi Capitals keep themselves alive in the playoff race of IPL 2026 with a three-wicket win over Punjab Kings at Dharamshala on Monday night.

metrics.name: Delhi Capitals points
metrics.evidence_text: The team currently has ten points after 12 games.

metrics.name: Axar Patel runs
metrics.evidence_text: Patel played a 30-ball knock of 56 runs, his highest score in this IPL.
